prose:
**Furan frontier-orbital result** — computed with DFT **B3LYP/def2-TZVP** (chemkit tier `standard`) using **PySCF**, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied fixed XYZ file `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/furan/furan.xyz` (9 atoms); no geometry optimization was reported by this frontier-orbitals run.

Headline result: **HOMO–LUMO gap = 6.2573602 eV**.

Other returned orbital values: HOMO = -6.3597638 eV; LUMO = -0.1024036 eV. The SCF converged: true, in 9 cycles. Total electronic energy returned: -230.11429 Hartree (-6261.7289 eV).

Warnings: no warnings were returned by the tool.

Integrity verdict: `integrity.trustworthy = true`.

Reproducibility: chemkit returned CLI invocation `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --charge 0 --mult 1 --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --tier standard /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/furan/furan.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmplzzq2wj0/live.json`. The tool result did not include a live `.out` log path, so I am not inventing one.
